v1_commands.start: reserved no-op; workers start from their invocation context

v2_commands.get_status: singleton status is replaced by device inventory plus global and library snapshots
v2_commands.save_config: split into set_source_location and set_global_settings; persisted iPod identity is replaced by adoption and inventory
v2_commands.subscribe_device_events: transition subscription is replaced by subscribe_inventory snapshots
v2_commands.unsubscribe_device_events: transition subscription is replaced by unsubscribe_inventory snapshots

v2_events.status_update: singleton status is replaced by device inventory plus global and library snapshots
v2_events.device_connected: transition events are replaced by authoritative device inventory snapshots
v2_events.device_disconnected: transition events are replaced by authoritative device inventory snapshots
v2_events.sync_event: nested raw JSON is replaced by typed progress events
v2_events.selection_update: singleton selection is replaced by device_config
v2_events.hello: the v2 hello shape is replaced by the role and capability aware v3 hello

v2_fields.daemon_settings.autostart_with_windows: platform-local UI preference, not a core wire setting
v2_fields.daemon_settings.enabled: legacy migration seed only; device settings auto_sync is the sole ongoing authority
v2_fields.config.ipod: host singleton identity is replaced by adopted device inventory
v2_fields.history.empty_serial: unscoped legacy entries are retained on disk but omitted from v3 history because they cannot be assigned safely
v2_fields.history.raw_serial: validated legacy 0x IDs are canonicalized to DeviceId when projected onto v3
v2_fields.history.missing_operation: legacy entries default to operation sync when projected onto v3
